title: cephalocarpus distichus
intro: Cephalocarpus distichus, commonly known as the distichous club moss or tassel club moss, is a type of evergreen plant belonging to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cephalocarpus distichus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Cephalocarpus distichus are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
